series_description: Printout of Central Accounting System screen detailing an electronic payment to a vendor for a purchase or service. May include invoice and receiving.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until auduted by Auditor and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Fiscal Department scans all the vouchers, payments, etc. under OAKS. Retain 10 years.

series_description: Request from vendor for payment of goods or services provided. Original to OBM, State Accounting. Copy filed with voucher. Original returned to agency with original voucher effective 10/1/85.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years after audit report by State Auditor/auditing firm is released ; Electronic: Retain with voucher for 10 years

series_description: Log forms used to record payment card purchases and CAS payments. Log forms must include invoice, receiving for each voucher number detailed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor and audit report is re;eased and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: 10 years.

series_description: Data generated during the creation of a master file or database used to validate a master file or database during a processing cycle.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for a minimum of 2 weeks

series_description: Copies of master files or databases, application software, logs, directories, and other records needed to restore a system in case of a disaster or inadvertent destruction.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for a minimum of 2 weeks

series_description: Industrial Commission order worksheets are completed by hearing officers pursuant to decisions rendered under Revised Code Chapters 4121, 4123, and 4131. The worksheets contain information to be included in published orders based on the instruction in the worksheets. After the orders are typed, they are reviewed and signed by hearing officers and published. The original orders are retained in the claim file or on file with the Industrial Commission as mandated in the respective Adm. Code or Revised Code.
retention_statement: Electronic: 90 days in origin format or platform (dictation, transcription, Word document, etc.)

series_description: Listing of claim numbers to be heard on a specific date. The docket sheet contains the claim number, claimant''s name, and the date and time of the hearing. The hearings are held on district, staff, and commission levels.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year from the date of the hearing.

series_description: Audit reports of all agency offices and departments in review of operations inclusive of health and safety, accessibility features, fiscal components, records management, customer service, notification, and other various operations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years from publish date of report. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years from publish date of report.

series_description: Detailed analysis of various adjudicatory process activities of the agency by districy, regional, and central offices. The report consists of tables and graphs.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from end of period covered in this report. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years from end of period covered in this report.

series_title: Time Study Analysis for Refusal Orders of Staff Hearing Officers
series_description: Analysis is performed on Refusal Orders of staff hearings on various time frames for processing. This report presents the median day for various time frames during adjudication and percentage interval analysis by region.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from publish dtate of report. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years from publish dtate of report.

series_title: Time Study Analysis on District Hearing Officer''s Allowance Issues; Quarterly
series_description: This report provides information to monitor compliance with time frames as established by HB 107 for District Hearing Officer Allowance Issues. This report includes several analyses: calculations of Median Days for various time frames, claims receipt and claims heard analysis table, and a table of frequency distribution.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years from publish date of report. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years from publish date of report.

series_title: Time Study Analysis on Staff Hearing Officer''s Appeal Issues; Quarterly
series_description: This report provides statistical analysis of the time frames as established by HB 107 for staff appeal issues. It presents the Median Day interval required to process a claim for hearing at various points during adjudication. The report includes several analyses: Median Day for all risk types, a claim receipt, and claims heard analysis.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years from publish date of report. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years from publish date of report.

series_title: Time Study Analysis on Permanent Total Disability; Quarterly
series_description: This report provides information to monitor trends for the issue of Permanent Total Disability. Only those claims in which a decision is final in nature are tracked. The report includes several analyses. Statistical analysis median is used to measure Permanent Total Disability adjudication time frames.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years from publish date of report. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years from publish date of report.

series_description: Nomination forms, voting records, meeting minutes and name of employee selected to be honored during a particular month. This will include the records of the employee of the year, which has been chosed from the employee of the month.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 10 years

series_description: Filled out by employees leaving the Industrial Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in agency 1 year

series_description: Form used to request special services such as equipment transfer, deliveries, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in agency one calendar year

series_description: Quarterly report of new appeals filed to common pleas court pursuant to Section 4123.512 O.R.C., new mandamus complaints filed, and court cases that are closed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from date of report ; Electronic: Retain 10 years from date of report

series_description: The Commission shall compile all of its original memorandums, orders, and decisions in a journal and make the journal available to the public with sufficient indexing to allow orderly review of documents. The journal shall indicate the vote of each commissioner.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until converted to electronic form ; Electronic: Retain 15 years.

series_description: An internal checklist that documents the action taken by Customer Service staff when researching correspondence or mail returned to the agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: These documents and emails verify that the interpreter was present at a hearing or medical exam, and that their service was provided and approved, and has been submitted for payment.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year from the date of receipt

series_description: This study is undertaken to provide BWC with Non-SI risk type hearing trends at all adjudicatory levels. The report is inclusive of a volume analysis for hearings held at all adjudicatory levels and unique claim volumes for hearings held for DHO Non-SI risk types on a quarterly basis.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year

series_description: This report details the number of continuances granted at hearing, continuances granted before hearing, the number of claims heard for allowances, appeals, and C-92''s for each district during the previous quarter and the number of continuances granted before hearing for "mutually agreed" versus "not mutually agreed".
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 5 years

series_description: The legal document that, when executed by an IC employee, enrolls them in the agency''s Midday Wellness Program. It also protects the agency from any litigation from an enrollee that may occur during participation in the Program.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: This document helps expedite participation in the agency''''''''s Midday Wellness Program. It establishes a written schedule of when & how each participant will partake in the Program. No medical information about each participant is displayed on this form.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Request for Authorization for Use of Private Owned Vehicle
series_description: A request from an agency employee to use their own private vehicle to travel to agency business. Approval of this form makes the employee eligible for the agency Mileage Reimbursement Policy.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and discrepancies are resolved

series_description: This form must be filled out by the requesting agency employee and approved by Administration (or it''s designee) for travel to conduct agency business that is not considered essential to agency operations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and discrepancies are resolved

series_description: IC-OS-5 Form used to order photo-copying needs.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in agency one calendar month

series_description: Records may include copies of drafts in any format that are used for reading, proofing, information, reference are are not the final product. This includes the following types of copies of drafts: meeting notes; notices memos; correspondence; reports; informal notes; reminder notes; video in progress; photos and out takes not used in footage; bloopers; bulletins; posters; general notices; emails; displays; blank forms; miscellaneous office documents; Transient messages; and other documents taht are works in progress and not the final product.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value to agency ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value to agency

series_description: Posts made by the Communications Director on Facebook, Twitter, or other social media Web sites that serve to market and inform customers about relevant activities within the agency. Social media sites will be used as a supplemental, not primary, marketing and informational resource for the Industrial Commission.
retention_statement: Electronic: retain 2 months from date posted

series_description: Per O.R.C. 4121.36 (f) (g), this record series is a compilation of commission votes on varying decisions compiled in a journal (i.e., Commission level appeal acceptance votes, votes on requests for continuance and cancellation of Commission level hearings).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 90 days from the date the decision is published and ; Electronic: Retain 90 days from the date the decision is published

series_description: This records series contains files created by Security Services pertaining to injured workers claims that have been flagged as security risks. The files contain documents such as but not limited to incident reports, internal memos, detailed medical correspondence, reports or assessments from medical personnel, and correspondence from parties representing injured workers or employers. These documents contain summarized and confidential descriptions of incidents that may give rise to a particular security risk.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper documents should be recycled no Earlier than 90 days from the closure of the last PCN and or active file. ; Electronic: Electronic copies of these documents should be retained indefinitely.

series_description: The Confidential Personal Information (CPI) Access Log keeps track of who has accessed confidential personal information (CPI) pursuant to
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 12 months in the active production environment

series_description: Documents pertaining to public records requests including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor or other staff, redacted and unredacted responsive records, acknowledgement letters, response letters. Maintained to document compliance with public records laws obligations (
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years ; Electronic: Retain 10 years

series_description: Draft Deputy Orders as created by, and referenced in O.R.C 4123.51.1
retention_statement: Paper: Until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Copies of IC surveillance video footage made to supplement any action, including but not limited to, accidents, incidents, investigations, etc. For purposes of potential litigation, any such copies shall be retained as source documents for a period of 1 year.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year from date stamp original video is recorded.

series_description: A form that is completed when a document on ECM or the BWC network needs to be re-indexed or deleted.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 120-days from the document date ; Electronic: Retain for 120-days from the document date

series_description: Electronic recordings of routine surveillance activities within Industrial Commission offices.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 10 days from the date of the recording, and

series_description: This record series consists of a budget report documenting items purchased or budgeted for in a given fiscal year that fall under $500 dollar value.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from date of report, or until audited and ; Electronic: Retain 2 years from date of report, or until audited and

series_description: This record series consists of a system generated report that documents the movement of assets from one location to another location. These records have met their retention period and are no longer current or used.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from date of report ; Electronic: Retain 2 years from date of report

series_description: This record series consists of reports documenting various requested information queried from the Fixed Asset Management System.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from date of report ; Electronic: Retain 2 years from date of report

series_description: This record series consists of an itemized listing of purchased inventoried assets in the agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from date of report or until audited ; Electronic: Retain 2 years from date of report or until audited

series_description: This record series consists of a report that documents the delivery and receipts of agency items, including but not limited to items such as supplies, furniture, cabinets etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from date of report ; Electronic: Retain 2 years from date of report

series_description: This record series consists of an itemized listing of agency assets that are to be disposed of.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from date of report or until audited ; Electronic: Retain 2 years from date of report or until audited

series_description: This record series pertains to travel information entered by an employee documenting the mileage traveled to and from a destination in the course of conducting agency business. These records are audited by the Fiscal department and are not directly related to reimbursements.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronic copies for 18 months from the date the trip ticket travel occurred

series_title: Payroll Registers and W-2 rosters by Pay Period
series_description: Agency payroll registers and W-2 rosters containing detailed employee pay information. The records on hand are from pay period ending 1-13-1978 through pay period ending 3-31-2007. These records are on Microfiche only.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain 110 years from the date of the most current record.

series_description: A form created when an IC specialist examiner or their representative inquire about non-payment of a fee bill. The form contains the date, claim number, the specialist information,name, provider numbers, date of service, and amount of the bill. This form is used as receipt of inquiry and documentation of action for reconciliation of payment.
retention_statement: Electronic: Two years

series_description: This report provides information on PTD (Permanent Total Disability) Hearings and PTD Tentative Order decisions (granted, denied, referred, dismissed, reset/continued) on a monthly basis. This report presents the number of PTD''s granted and denied by month with graphs and tables.
retention_statement: Electronic: retain 5 years from creation date of report

series_description: The record series contains any and all self evaluations, and transition plans including but not limited to audits, performed by the agency in regards to compliance with ADA requirements.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: This record series consists of an annual calendar year report examining the production and operational performance activities of the agency. The report contains, but is not limited to, data on Inventory, Hearing Activity, Medical Activity, Performance, and a Statistical Overview.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years after the publish date of the report ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after the publish date of the report

series_description: The Drivers Log is a form used for the tracking of daily driver and vehicle activity.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain five years from date of completion and destroy.

series_description: Any and all documents relating to an employees ergonomic file within the agency. The file may include, but is not limited to,documents such as ergonomic assessments, recommendations, checklists and so forth. Some information contained within the forms and documents may be of a confidential nature.
retention_statement: Paper: All employee ergonomic files should be sent to the agency ergonomic coordinator. Once an employee leaves the agency, retain for 2 years ; Electronic: All employee ergonomic files should be sent to the agency ergonomic coordinator. Once an employee leaves the agency, retain for 2 years

series_description: Includes IC''s internal employee newsletter articles which are posted on IConnect.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Includes fundraising materials for the IC''s charitable campaign, which includes Operation Feed, Combined Charitable Campaign and Holiday Food Basket.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: This record series serves to fulfill the requirements of O.R. C. 149.01. The Annual Report provides information on agency activities for the current fiscal year. The Annual Report may also contain information about the financial outlook, accomplishments, goals, and year end statistics.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years after end of reporting fiscal year ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after end of reporting fiscal year

series_description: Comment Cards are used to assess customer satisfaction and or service concerns that may arise within the agency. They can be received in either a paper or electronic format. The comments are reviewed, compiled and used to upgrade, monitor, or improve existing services within the agency. At times, they may contain some personal and confidential information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 months from the date on the card ; Electronic: Retain for 3 months from the date on the card

series_title: List of Video Action Request Forms
series_description: This records series consists of an electronic list of completed Video Action Request forms. The forms are used for documenting that hard copy evidence videos have been uploaded into the ECM system for hearing officer review.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain15 months after the creation date

series_description: This record series consists of minutes for non-executive committee meetings and is inclusive of,but not limited to, agency meetings of labor/management, health and safety, procedure committee, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 4 years from the date of the meeting

series_description: I.C. Fee Bills are forms originated by the Industrial Commission to pay physicians for medical evaluations. Payment of the fee bills is handled by the Bureau of Workers Compensation.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 Years

series_description: This record series pertains to the agency application that tracks conflicts based on, but not limited to, the following:Risk, Representative, Injured Worker, and or other Hearing Officer conflicts.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until employee is no longer active in the system or has separated from employment.

series_description: The record series pertains to, and consists of any agency documents, policy statements and guidelines for complaints filed against Hearing Officers as outlined in Memo R12. The series is inclusive of the complaint, agency correspondence, agency response, and all documents related specifically to the complaint. Note: Any disciplinary action taken related and subsequent to a hearing officer complaint will not be maintained in this record.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain all relevant/related materials three years from the date that the complaint was closed ; Electronic: Retain all relevant/related materials three years from the date that the complaint was closed

series_description: Surveys are used to assess internal and external customer satisfaction, measure outcomes, and develop performance measures and benchmarks. They can be used in either a paper or electronic format. The answers are compiled and used to upgrade, monitor, or improve existing services within the agency. At times, they may contain some personal and confidential information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year

series_description: The docket sheet contains the claim numbers, claimant''''''''s names, the date and time of the hearing, comments on settlement negotiations or other related matters pertaining to VSSR (Violation of a Specific Safety Requirement) hearings.
retention_statement: Paper: convert document into PDF ; Electronic: retain 1 year from the date of conference

series_description: An ASR is an electronic form used to request agency support services. These records are created from various mechanisms: On line applications. Agency facilities email. Agency IT help desk emails.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 4 years from the date the ticket was closed

series_description: This record series pertains to customer calls received by the agency. A database record is created, via software, when a customer calls the agency. The ticket is considered closed once the customers issue(s) are resolved.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years after the close date of the ticket

series_description: Per agency procedure number PROC002, Supervisors and Managers are required to maintain a time verification worksheet to document all spot checks of the start or end time of the employees assigned to them. Note:- (This schedule is not encompassed under,nor is it the same as, the general schedule GP-Pay-01).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year from the date of the respective pay period ending date and ; Electronic: Retain 1 year from the date of the respective pay period ending date and

series_description: This is a quarterly report that identifies claims meeting the criteria set forth in O.A.C. 4121-3-20 regarding VSSR (Violation of Specific Safety Requirement) awards.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years from the published order date. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years from the published order date.

series_description: This monthly report details Commission/Deputy Appeal hearing time frames dictated by
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years from publish date of report. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years from publish date of report.

series_description: Images of Claim documents maintained for adjudication of disputed and jurisdictional workers compensation issues.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronically on agency system for 2 years from closure of the last PCN (position control number)

series_description: This record series is mandated by O.A.C. 4167-6-01 and requires employers to be compliant with PERRP specified records retention requirements. This schedule is inclusive of the Log, Reports, and the Summary of work related injuries and illnesses.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain the Log, reports, and Summary for five years following the year to which they pertain ; Electronic: Retain the Log and Summary for five years following the year to which they pertain

series_description: This record series pertains to the agency application that holds and tracks when employees acknowledge an agency policy.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 7 years from effective date of employee separation.

series_description: A document that logs in a visitor''s personal property (i.e. a small pen or pocket knife, chemical mace, etc.) sequestered prior to entering an IC facility. The property is then signed for and returned to the owner prior to leaving the office premises.
retention_statement: Electronic: Store on site 18 month after the last recorded date on the sheet

series_description: Documentation of the specialist panel Independent Medical Examination (IME) report review performed by the Chief Medical Advisor and/or Director of Medical Services. The review is to determine if the medical examination conforms with the requirements set forth by the agency. These reviews are done annually, or on a as needed basis. The information contained in these reviews is confidential per O.R.C. 2305.24
retention_statement: Electronic: Electronic copies are not to be deleted and are to be kept indefinitely.

series_description: Documentation regarding issues or dissatisfaction with a medical examination or report conducted by an IC specialist as part of the Permanent Total Disability or other process to include original communications from a party to the claim, agency communication to and from the specialist involved, and the agency''s response to the complaint.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year ; Electronic: Do not Destroy.

series_description: Credentialing packet for each panel member to include documentation of mandatory requirements met for the application and re-application process.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one year ; Electronic: Indefinite, do not destroy

series_description: The booklet outlines the agency''s recent activity, future activities, objectives, and obligations and provides rationale for future expenditures.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years past the end of the respective biennium period ; Electronic: Retain 2 years past the end of the respective biennium period

series_description: This report provides information detailing the DHO Allowance and SHO Appeal time frames. It provides specific performance data within the adjudication process utilized as the boundary for a specific interval time period. The action dates are Filing Date, Hearing Date, Typing Date, and Findings Mailed Date. These dates are used to measure various statutory time frame requirements pursuant to Ohio Revised Code 4123.511
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain reports for six months from publish date

series_description: A quarterly claim activity report of the IC Workers Compensation claims managed by the CareWorks Managed Care Organization. The report consists of, but is not limited to, metrics such as Allowed Claim Summary, Allowed Claim Lag Time Average, Claims by Month, Claims by Day of Week, Bill Type Summary, Average Medical Cost Per Claim, ICD code allowances etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years from the end of the quarter of the report. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years from the end of the quarter of the report.

series_description: This record consists of electronic data associated with the sending and receiving of all faxes to and from the agency and the corresponding meta data.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain18 months from the date of reception and or transmission.

series_title: Certificate of Compliance and Action Plan
series_description: To facilitate compliance with
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years from the latest confirmation of receipt date from DAS. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years from the latest confirmation of receipt date from DAS.

series_description: This report contains a statistical analysis on compensation benefits and medical payments.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of any fiscal, administrative, or legal value. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of any fiscal, administrative, or legal value.

series_description: A brief synopsis received from the Attorney General''s office that summarizes the courts decision pertaining to the relevant court case with attached court documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year from the date of receipt. ; Electronic: Retain 1 year from the date of receipt.

series_description: Pursuant to O.R.C. 4121.36 and 4121.10 this record series consists of executive meeting minutes of the agency Commissioners and their votes/decisions on varying issues. topics compiled in a journal.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain only until transfered into electronic format ; Electronic: Retain 75 years on site from date of meeting held

series_description: A synopsis of the claim that cites relevant court cases. This includes, but is not limited to, the magistrates decision and the Court of Appeals decision as well as the recommended course of action. The document consists of the majority vote and signatures of the agency commissioners if the agency will be filing an appeal with the Supreme Court of Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 75 years from decision due date. ; Electronic: Retain 75 years from decision due date.

series_description: Executive Employees are those employees that serve in roles including, but not limited to, the Chairman, Commission Members, Executive Director, Chief Legal Counsel, Director of Hearing Services, and the Director of Operations. When employees at these levels leave the agency, their E-mail, VOIP (phone) , Hard drives, and Network drive information should be retained for an indefinite period.
retention_statement: Paper: Do not destroy. Convert to a maintenance medium and retain indefinitely. ; Electronic: Do not destroy. Convert to a maintenance medium and retain indefinitely. ; Microform: Do not destroy. Convert to a maintenance medium and retain indefinitely.
disposition: Paper: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent ; Microform: Permanent

series_description: A written opinion of a magistrate issued after a hearing or trial, which includes findings of fact and conclusion of law. If an objection is filed to the decision, the jury or judges overseeing the magistrate will review the magistrate decision to determine whether it contains any errors of law.Supreme Court Appeals---Final decision from the 10th District court of appeals on requests for mandamus.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years from date of court decision. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years from date of court decision.

series_description: This record series consists of a request for leave submitted by an employee to their supervisor or designee that is denied. This electronic record is maintained by the agency''s Information Technology department.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain one year from the date of the denial

series_description: This monthly report lists corrected orders published during the previous month. The report is to be used by each regional manager for informational purposes only.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain one year from the publish date of the document

series_description: The report details hearings and statistics for statewide hearing officers excluding exempt staff. The report is compiled by extrapolating data from CAS, Data Warehouse, etc queries and entering it into Excel. The workbook converts transferred data into report statistics.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain one year from the publish date of the document

series_description: This records series consists of, but not limited to, IC medical reports that are deemed deficient and unacceptable.
retention_statement: Electronic: 1 year from the date of receipt by the agency. Delete electronic copy, and destroy hard copy (if kept)

series_description: Monthly checklists completed to ensure minimally required elements of the following are present, in the appropriate quantity, functional, relevant items are unexpired, and other required elements are in satisfactory order: -First-aid Kit Checklist -AED Checklist -Fire Extinguisher Checklist -Safe Room Checklist -Wheelchair Checklist
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronic copy for one year

series_description: The Floor Plans contain the physical location on the floor for each office/pod, space number, and person assigned to that location. It also includes the location of stairwells, elevators, restrooms, storage and supply rooms, kitchen, conference rooms.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until revised or superseded. Dispose of last version when no longer occupying facility. ; Electronic: Retain until revised or superseded. Dispose of last version when no longer occupying facility.

series_description: A written request from a Representative to not schedule hearing(s) for a given day or time period.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year from the date received. ; Electronic: Retain one year from the date received.

series_description: A written description of a departments proposed goals for the upcoming year, and its completed accomplishments from the past year.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five years from the date the document was created. ; Electronic: Retain five years from the date the document was created.

series_description: Summaries of Supreme court rulings on matters relating to employment and worker's compensation law.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain one year from the date of submission to agency staff.

series_description: An agency form used in the annual inspection of wheelchairs for proper functionality and ease of use. The form and its contents may be incorporated into other inspections documents or checklists as operationally needed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 calendar year from date of inspection ; Electronic: Retain 1 calendar year from date of inspection
